pge.source: PG&E 2026 Solar Billing Plan EEC Values Price Sheet PDF
notes: Expanded from monthly hour-of-day weekday/weekend schedule into 2026 hourly timestamps.
Holiday-specific treatment is not applied; weekend table is used for Saturdays/Sundays only.
Weekend 1:00 PM and weekday 6:00 PM/7:00 PM rows were missing in PDF extraction and were interpolated from adjacent hours.
Timestamps parsed from Excel serial date/time values in source CSV.

sdge.source: SDG&E current year MIDAS upload CSV
notes: Source timestamps were normalized by -8 hours to create a complete local-time 2026 hourly window.
